enemy_brute_prime_idle.prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: production 2D mobile game sprite animation strip. Create exactly six evenly spaced full-body frames in one horizontal row of the same front-facing enraged armored brute mini-boss. Shape language: squat massive alien tank, huge rectangular shoulders, short legs, oversized simple fists, two blunt horns, one small amber reactor. Use flat vector-like cartoon shapes, large clean color blocks, minimal surface detail, almost no texture, soft deep navy outline, only two hard cel-shading tones. Limited medium-saturation rust red, charcoal and warm gray palette; amber accent only 10-15%; keep the body clearly lighter than the chroma background. Explicit loop choreography: frame 1 neutral wide stance; frame 2 shoulders rise 4% and fists move inward; frame 3 torso compresses 6% and right fist lowers; frame 4 reactor brightens and both fists clench outward; frame 5 torso rebounds 4% and shoulders lower; frame 6 returns near neutral. Perfectly flat solid #00FF00 chroma-key background, no floor, no shadow, no glow haze. Every frame isolated with large equal gaps, identical identity and scale. No grid, borders, text, labels, numbers, watermark, cropped limbs, extra characters, realistic metal, tiny scratches, painterly rendering, realistic lighting, 3D rendering, gradients, neon colors, perspective or side view.
